places.name: Athens
places.summary: The cradle of democracy and Western philosophy — marble temples, olive light, and 2,500 years of ideas.

places.name: København–Malmö
places.summary: Across the Øresund: four waves of urban regeneration — harbour reclamation, the climate / sponge city, and today's carbon, land-scarcity and ecological conflicts — plus the culture that fills it.
